prompt_inputs.goal: maintain energy for casual jogging 3x per week
prompt_inputs.restrictions: no nuts, no dairy, plant-based only

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers exactly 1 day with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and 1-2 snacks
All meals are plant-based with no nuts or dairy products
Provides adequate protein (approximately 50-60g) and carbohydrates for moderate athletic activity
Plan is concise and compact, presented in clear, easy-to-scan format
task_description: write consise and compact 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an amateur athlete (casual jogger) with moderate nutritional needs, food allergies (nuts, dairy), and preference for plant-based options

prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - high-endurance performance with carbohydrate loading

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all meals for one day (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks) in concise format
Includes high carbohydrate content (55-65% of calories) appropriate for marathon training
All foods and meals are gluten-free with no wheat, barley, or rye products
Calorie intake aligns with high-endurance athlete needs (approximately 2,800-3,200 calories for a 68kg runner)
task_description: write consise and compact 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high calorie intake and carbohydrate loading, with specific dietary restrictions like gluten-free requirements

prompt_inputs.goal: muscle recovery and strength gains with budget constraints and minimal cooking time
prompt_inputs.restrictions: no shellfish, prefers simple recipes under 15 minutes prep per meal

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains at least 4 meals/snacks with minimum 25g protein per meal to support muscle recovery
All meals are realistic to prepare in under 15 minutes with minimal cooking equipment
Plan includes budget-friendly protein sources (eggs, canned tuna, Greek yogurt, chicken breast, legumes)
Plan is presented in a concise, single-day format with clear timing and macronutrient focus
task_description: write consise and compact 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) needing protein-focused nutrition for muscle recovery, with budget constraints and limited cooking time
